markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 10
#### Article 46. Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
##### § 2132 — Effect on other laws

The penal provisions of this article in no way repeal or modify any existing provision of the penal law but are additional and supplementary thereto.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The penal provisions of this article in no way repeal or modify any existing provision of the penal law but are additional and supplementary thereto.
